verse_text: And they said, 'What is that to us? You see to it! ' Then he threw down the pieces of silver in the temple and departed, and went and hanged himself.

links.context: See [[MAT.27:3]]-5. Though the accounts may seem to differ, Luke's report here is merely a more detailed account of Judas' end. This should also be understood in a spiritual sense, that the heart and soul of the rebellious or faithless person will be spilled out in the final judgment.
